pr.title: Fix shiftability by patching broken relocs in hsd_3AA7
pr.author: r-burns

summary: Added an add_relocations block to config/GALE01/config.yml to patch broken relocation metadata around hsd_3AA7 and restore shiftability. The patch is config-only: it enumerates .text-source rel24 relocations to calls such as CARD/OS/memset/memcpy and hsd_803B2FA0/hsd_803B2B20, plus many sda21 relocations to small-data symbols hsd_804D7980/7988/7990/7994/799C, including several hsd_804D7988 references with addend: 4. decomp.dev reported GALE01 'No changes', supporting that this changed relocation/shiftability metadata without altering the built output.

key_files.change: Added add_relocations entries for broken rel24 and sda21 relocations in the hsd_3AA7 address range.

what_changed: Introduced an add_relocations section in config/GALE01/config.yml below the existing symbols, splits, mw_comment_version, and quick_analysis settings.

Added rel24 relocations from .text addresses in the 0x803AACxx-0x803AC1xx range to functions/symbols including hsd_803B2FA0, hsd_803B2B20, memset, memcpy, OSDisableInterrupts, OSRestoreInterrupts, CARDFastOpen, CARDClose, CARDReadAsync, CARDWriteAsync, CARDCreateAsync, CARDGetXferredBytes, CARDGetStatus, and CARDSetStatusAsync.
Added sda21 relocations from the same .text region to small-data symbols hsd_804D7980, hsd_804D7988, hsd_804D7990, hsd_804D7994, and hsd_804D799C.
Included explicit addend: 4 on several sda21 relocations targeting hsd_804D7988.
No source C or headers changed; the PR only adjusted project configuration relocation metadata.
smart_moves: Fixed shiftability at the relocation layer instead of perturbing matched code or symbols.
Used add_relocations to document and patch missing/broken relocations in a centralized config file.
Separated relocation kinds accurately: rel24 for branch/call targets and sda21 for small-data references.
Preserved known SDK/libc symbol names for relocation targets where available, while leaving unknown HSD addresses as hsd_XXXXXXXX labels.
Added explicit addends where the small-data reference required hsd_804D7988 + 4 rather than the base symbol.
decomp_lessons: A matching binary can still be non-shiftable if relocation metadata is incomplete or broken; shiftability fixes may need config-level add_relocations entries.
For discovered relocation holes, record the exact source section/address, relocation type, target symbol, and addend when applicable.
Do not rewrite code solely to compensate for missing relocations if the issue is metadata; patch the relocation table/config instead.
Bot output of 'No changes' can be useful evidence that a relocation/config fix did not alter the generated GALE01 code/data comparison.
Small-data references should be audited for addends, not just base target symbols.
naming_conventions: Unknown HSD functions/data are represented as hsd_ followed by an uppercase hexadecimal address, e.g. hsd_803B2FA0 and hsd_804D7988.

Nintendo SDK symbols keep their canonical casing, e.g. OSDisableInterrupts, OSRestoreInterrupts, CARDFastOpen, CARDReadAsync, CARDWriteAsync, CARDCreateAsync, CARDGetXferredBytes, CARDGetStatus, and CARDSetStatusAsync.
Standard C library targets remain lowercase, e.g. memset and memcpy.
Relocation entries use YAML keys source, type, target, and optional addend under add_relocations.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Use rel24 entries for branch/call relocations from .text to function targets.
Use sda21 entries for small-data-area references from .text to hsd_804D79xx symbols.
When the instruction references an offset inside a small-data symbol, encode that explicitly with addend rather than inventing a separate target symbol.
A config-only relocation patch can improve shiftability while preserving exact build output.

review_feedback.feedback: No human review comments or PR body were present in the provided slice.

searchable_terms: Fix shiftability by patching broken relocs in hsd_3AA7
